privileged_info_summary: The task requires updating the project Title to 'European Operations Rollout', changing the currency to EUR/€, and setting the 'Project Manager' resource's rate to 90.00. However, the initial environment loads a 'Commercial Construction' sample project instead of the expected 'Enterprise Software Development Project'. Consequently, the target resource 'Project Manager' does not exist in the initial project file, meaning the agent would need to create it to pass the resource rate check. All metadata targets (output path, expected title, expected currency symbol and code, expected resource name, and expected rate) have been verified against the verifier.py and the prompt.
